features: The Beauty Formulas Brightening Vitamin C series provides advanced skin care to help reveal your inner glow.
The active formula with a complex of vitamins B, C and E will provide the nourishment your skin needs to maintain a radiant, energizing and fresh look.
The face sheet mask is soaked in a vitamin-rich serum containing natural extracts of green tea, raspberry and witch hazel to effectively moisturize the skin.
Its active formula contains a blend of moisturizers that soften and refresh lifeless skin. It leaves the skin energized and radiant.
